name: hyperwave-mobile
description: HyperWave mobile (Expo + react-native-bare-kit) — hosts the shared engine (hyperwave) in a Bare worklet.

scripts.bundle: bare-pack --target ios --target android --linked --defer bufferutil --defer utf-8-validate --out bundles/app.bundle.mjs ../../packages/hyperwave-engine/worklet/app.js
scripts.ios: npm run bundle && npm run link:ios-addons && expo run:ios
